ddls:
CREATE TABLE "conferences" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "conference_name" TEXT /* Name of the conference (e.g., ACC, Big Ten) */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the conference was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the conference */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Current number of teams in the conference */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the conference logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team (e.g., Duke, Virginia) */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the conference the team belongs to */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's home stadium */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team logo */,
  "mascot" TEXT /* Team mascot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team this record belongs to */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for which the record is applicable */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins in the season */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses in the season */,
  "conference_wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins in conference games */,
  "conference_losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses in conference games */,
  "neutral_wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins in neutral site games */,
  "neutral_losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses in neutral site games */,
  "home_wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins in home games */,
  "home_losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses in home games */,
  "away_wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins in away games */,
  "away_losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses in away games */,
  "points_for" INTEGER /* Total points scored in the season */,
  "points_against" INTEGER /* Total points allowed in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_records_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conference_records" (
  "conference_record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference record entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team this conference record belongs to */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for which the conference record is applicable */,
  "conference_wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins in conference games */,
  "conference_losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses in conference games */,
  "neutral_wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins in neutral site conference games */,
  "neutral_losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses in neutral site conference games */,
  "home_wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins in home conference games */,
  "home_losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses in home conference games */,
  "away_wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins in away conference games */,
  "away_losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses in away conference games */,
  "points_for" INTEGER /* Total points scored in conference games */,
  "points_against" INTEGER /* Total points allowed in conference games */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conference_records_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team this ranking belongs to */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for which the ranking is applicable */,
  "rpi_rank" INTEGER /* RPI rank of the team */,
  "sos_rank" INTEGER /* SOS rank of the team */,
  "overall_rank" INTEGER /* Overall national rank */,
  "preseason_rank" INTEGER /* Preseason rank */,
  "midseason_rank" INTEGER /* Midseason rank */,
  "postseason_rank" INTEGER /* Postseason rank */,
  "conference_rank" INTEGER /* Rank within the conference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the user is associated with (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the record */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or client used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES records ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
